meta.notice: Mapped records in this iteration are limited to public appearances, official public meetings, public ceremonies, official/host summit records, or clearly labelled secondary-source leads. No private addresses, hotels, hospitals, residences, leaked itineraries or inferred live routes are included.
meta.refreshModel: nightly rolling 36-month backfill, evening profile-only scan, overnight future scan, daily roster delta review, weekly portrait cache, annual full roster rebuild
meta.safetyPrecision: city-level future defaults; past events remain city or public-venue level only when the venue is deliberately public
meta.status: v5.3.0 extends the crawler and planner from a 24-month archive to a rolling 36-month travel-capture window.
meta.name: ParleyMap
meta.iterationNote: v2.5.2 calms the travel movie into a step-by-step roadmovie with pause, stop, scrub, back, forward, fast, restart, dotted return-home lines, compact hover cards, and clickable top-20 opening names.
meta.launchCoverage: Top-10 opening face map, full top-200 roster, 94 mapped figures, 539 public records, foreign-minister travel expansion, event-attendee graph and below-map intelligence rankings.
meta.positioning: Understand where influence is forming. Public appearances. Mapped intelligently.
meta.pilotCoverage: Top-20 opening face map, full top-200 pull-down roster, 23 mapped public figures, 87 public appearance records, summit watch, peace-process highlights, executive public-event records, leader bios with birthday and age fields where available, and homebase-to-destination analytical arcs.
meta.crawlerStatus: rolling 36-month public-source crawler plus daily profile-travel scanner; profile-only names are prioritised until a source-backed trail exists
meta.versionNotes: Rolling 36-month capture pass: all roster and expansion profiles get monthly backfill jobs, daily profile/source scans, and stricter no-private-tracking publication gates.

coverageSummary.publicationRule: official or host-public source required for future records; discovery/social/local leads must become safe public source packs before publication; no private movement or leaked itineraries

meta.lastCrawlerRun: not run in offline build container
meta.interfaceNote: Clean map-first release with smarter public-trip chaining and compact hovers.
meta.visualPass: single-flag portrait map with anchor leader lines and portrait-quality guardrails

profileAudit.note: Each top-200 profile now has profileLines, social search links, flag audit and image audit fields.

meta.anchorNote: v4.2 keeps the accepted map-first/profile-right/below-map-intelligence layout and restores original map functionality after v4 panel expansion.
meta.productFocus: presence intelligence, alerts, agendas, themes, organisations, overlap matrix and power geography
